headline: Why Onto Innovation Is A Still A Buy After More Than Doubling In 4 Years
summary: Onto Innovation (ONTO) stock: 220%+ returns since 2022, record Q4, AI semiconductor equipment tailwinds, and $2B run-rate goal. Read more macro analysis here.
